# Best Betting Tips — llms.txt

## About
Best Betting Tips (bestbettingtips.com.au) provides free daily Australian sports and racing tips including horse racing, greyhounds, NBA, NBL, NRL, NFL, soccer, MLB and UFC. Tips are published every morning and are completely free.

## What we offer
- Free daily horse racing tips for all Australian tracks
- Free greyhound racing tips
- NBA, NBL, NRL, NFL, soccer, MLB and UFC analysis and tips
- Australian bookmaker reviews and bonus codes
- Partner bookmakers: BetFocus and TeamBet (code: BBT500)

## Who we are
Best Betting Tips is an Australian sports analysis site. We do not offer wagering services. All tips are for informational purposes only. 18+ only. Gamble responsibly.

## Contact
admin@bestbettingtips.com.au

## Site
https://bestbettingtips.com.au
